001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.AcceptedState;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueReport;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueType;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.ReportImage;
007import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.ReportLocation;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
009import java.net.URI;
010import java.net.URL;
011import java.time.Instant;
012import java.util.List;
013import java.util.UUID;
014
015/**
016 * Response DTO for {@code GET /manager/issue-reports}.
017 *
018 * <p>Uses nested DTOs for related entities to avoid recursive JSON serialization.
019 */
020public class ManagerIssueReportResponse {
021
022  private UUID externalId;
023  private UserProfileResponse userProfile;
024  private ReportLocationResponse reportLocation;
025  private AcceptedStateResponse acceptedState;
026  private List<IssueTypeResponse> issueTypes;
027  private Instant timeFirstReported;
028  private Instant timeLastModified;
029  private String textDescription;
030  private List<ReportImageResponse> reportImages;
031
032  /**
033   * Returns the issue report external identifier.
034   *
035   * @return external ID.
036   */
037  public UUID getExternalId() {
038    return externalId;
039  }
040
041  /**
042   * Sets the issue report external identifier.
043   *
044   * @param externalId external ID.
045   */
046  public void setExternalId(UUID externalId) {
047    this.externalId = externalId;
048  }
049
050  /**
051   * Returns the reporting user profile details.
052   *
053   * @return user profile DTO.
054   */
055  public UserProfileResponse getUserProfile() {
056    return userProfile;
057  }
058
059  /**
060   * Sets the reporting user profile details.
061   *
062   * @param userProfile user profile DTO.
063   */
064  public void setUserProfile(UserProfileResponse userProfile) {
065    this.userProfile = userProfile;
066  }
067
068  /**
069   * Returns the report location details.
070   *
071   * @return report location DTO.
072   */
073  public ReportLocationResponse getReportLocation() {
074    return reportLocation;
075  }
076
077  /**
078   * Sets the report location details.
079   *
080   * @param reportLocation report location DTO.
081   */
082  public void setReportLocation(ReportLocationResponse reportLocation) {
083    this.reportLocation = reportLocation;
084  }
085
086  /**
087   * Returns the accepted-state details for the report.
088   *
089   * @return accepted-state DTO.
090   */
091  public AcceptedStateResponse getAcceptedState() {
092    return acceptedState;
093  }
094
095  /**
096   * Sets the accepted-state details for the report.
097   *
098   * @param acceptedState accepted-state DTO.
099   */
100  public void setAcceptedState(AcceptedStateResponse acceptedState) {
101    this.acceptedState = acceptedState;
102  }
103
104  /**
105   * Returns the issue types associated with the report.
106   *
107   * @return list of issue type DTOs.
108   */
109  public List<IssueTypeResponse> getIssueTypes() {
110    return issueTypes;
111  }
112
113  /**
114   * Sets the issue types associated with the report.
115   *
116   * @param issueTypes list of issue type DTOs.
117   */
118  public void setIssueTypes(List<IssueTypeResponse> issueTypes) {
119    this.issueTypes = issueTypes;
120  }
121
122  /**
123   * Returns the time the report was first created.
124   *
125   * @return first-reported timestamp.
126   */
127  public Instant getTimeFirstReported() {
128    return timeFirstReported;
129  }
130
131  /**
132   * Sets the time the report was first created.
133   *
134   * @param timeFirstReported first-reported timestamp.
135   */
136  public void setTimeFirstReported(Instant timeFirstReported) {
137    this.timeFirstReported = timeFirstReported;
138  }
139
140  /**
141   * Returns the time the report was last modified.
142   *
143   * @return last-modified timestamp.
144   */
145  public Instant getTimeLastModified() {
146    return timeLastModified;
147  }
148
149  /**
150   * Sets the time the report was last modified.
151   *
152   * @param timeLastModified last-modified timestamp.
153   */
154  public void setTimeLastModified(Instant timeLastModified) {
155    this.timeLastModified = timeLastModified;
156  }
157
158  /**
159   * Returns the user-supplied report description text.
160   *
161   * @return description text.
162   */
163  public String getTextDescription() {
164    return textDescription;
165  }
166
167  /**
168   * Sets the user-supplied report description text.
169   *
170   * @param textDescription description text.
171   */
172  public void setTextDescription(String textDescription) {
173    this.textDescription = textDescription;
174  }
175
176  /**
177   * Returns the images associated with the report.
178   *
179   * @return list of image DTOs.
180   */
181  public List<ReportImageResponse> getReportImages() {
182    return reportImages;
183  }
184
185  /**
186   * Sets the images associated with the report.
187   *
188   * @param reportImages list of image DTOs.
189   */
190  public void setReportImages(List<ReportImageResponse> reportImages) {
191    this.reportImages = reportImages;
192  }
193
194  /**
195   * Creates a response DTO from an {@link IssueReport} entity.
196   *
197   * @param report source entity.
198   * @return populated DTO, or {@code null} if {@code report} is {@code null}.
199   */
200  public static ManagerIssueReportResponse fromEntity(IssueReport report) {
201    if (report == null) {
202      return null;
203    }
204    ManagerIssueReportResponse dto = new ManagerIssueReportResponse();
205    dto.setExternalId(report.getExternalId());
206    dto.setUserProfile(UserProfileResponse.fromEntity(report.getUserProfile()));
207    dto.setReportLocation(ReportLocationResponse.fromEntity(report.getReportLocation()));
208    dto.setAcceptedState(AcceptedStateResponse.fromEntity(report.getAcceptedState()));
209    dto.setIssueTypes(
210        report.getIssueTypes().stream()
211            .map(IssueTypeResponse::fromEntity)
212            .toList()
213    );
214    dto.setTimeFirstReported(report.getTimeFirstReported());
215    dto.setTimeLastModified(report.getTimeLastModified());
216    dto.setTextDescription(report.getTextDescription());
217    dto.setReportImages(
218        report.getReportImages().stream()
219            .map((image) -> ReportImageResponse.fromEntity(report.getExternalId(), image))
220            .toList()
221    );
222    return dto;
223  }
224
225  /**
226   * Nested DTO exposing a subset of {@link UserProfile} fields for manager views.
227   */
228  public static class UserProfileResponse {
229
230    private UUID externalId;
231    private String displayName;
232    private String email;
233    private URL avatar;
234    private boolean isManager;
235    private Instant timeCreated;
236    private boolean userEnabled;
237
238    /**
239     * Returns the user's external identifier.
240     *
241     * @return external ID.
242     */
243    public UUID getExternalId() {
244      return externalId;
245    }
246
247    /**
248     * Sets the user's external identifier.
249     *
250     * @param externalId external ID.
251     */
252    public void setExternalId(UUID externalId) {
253      this.externalId = externalId;
254    }
255
256    /**
257     * Returns the user's display name.
258     *
259     * @return display name.
260     */
261    public String getDisplayName() {
262      return displayName;
263    }
264
265    /**
266     * Sets the user's display name.
267     *
268     * @param displayName display name.
269     */
270    public void setDisplayName(String displayName) {
271      this.displayName = displayName;
272    }
273
274    /**
275     * Returns the user's email address.
276     *
277     * @return email address.
278     */
279    public String getEmail() {
280      return email;
281    }
282
283    /**
284     * Sets the user's email address.
285     *
286     * @param email email address.
287     */
288    public void setEmail(String email) {
289      this.email = email;
290    }
291
292    /**
293     * Returns the user's avatar URL, if available.
294     *
295     * @return avatar URL.
296     */
297    public URL getAvatar() {
298      return avatar;
299    }
300
301    /**
302     * Sets the user's avatar URL.
303     *
304     * @param avatar avatar URL.
305     */
306    public void setAvatar(URL avatar) {
307      this.avatar = avatar;
308    }
309
310    /**
311     * Returns whether the user has manager privileges.
312     *
313     * @return {@code true} if manager; {@code false} otherwise.
314     */
315    public boolean isManager() {
316      return isManager;
317    }
318
319    /**
320     * Sets whether the user has manager privileges.
321     *
322     * @param manager {@code true} if manager; {@code false} otherwise.
323     */
324    public void setManager(boolean manager) {
325      isManager = manager;
326    }
327
328    /**
329     * Returns the time the user profile was created.
330     *
331     * @return creation timestamp.
332     */
333    public Instant getTimeCreated() {
334      return timeCreated;
335    }
336
337    /**
338     * Sets the time the user profile was created.
339     *
340     * @param timeCreated creation timestamp.
341     */
342    public void setTimeCreated(Instant timeCreated) {
343      this.timeCreated = timeCreated;
344    }
345
346    /**
347     * Returns whether the user account is enabled.
348     *
349     * @return {@code true} if enabled; {@code false} otherwise.
350     */
351    public boolean isUserEnabled() {
352      return userEnabled;
353    }
354
355    /**
356     * Sets whether the user account is enabled.
357     *
358     * @param userEnabled {@code true} if enabled; {@code false} otherwise.
359     */
360    public void setUserEnabled(boolean userEnabled) {
361      this.userEnabled = userEnabled;
362    }
363
364    /**
365     * Creates a user profile DTO from an entity.
366     *
367     * @param userProfile source entity.
368     * @return populated DTO, or {@code null} if {@code userProfile} is {@code null}.
369     */
370    public static UserProfileResponse fromEntity(UserProfile userProfile) {
371      if (userProfile == null) {
372        return null;
373      }
374      UserProfileResponse dto = new UserProfileResponse();
375      dto.setExternalId(userProfile.getExternalId());
376      dto.setDisplayName(userProfile.getDisplayName());
377      dto.setEmail(userProfile.getEmail());
378      dto.setAvatar(userProfile.getAvatar());
379      dto.setManager(userProfile.isManager());
380      dto.setTimeCreated(userProfile.getTimeCreated());
381      dto.setUserEnabled(userProfile.getUserEnabled());
382      return dto;
383    }
384
385  }
386
387  /**
388   * Nested DTO exposing a subset of {@link ReportLocation} fields for manager views.
389   */
390  public static class ReportLocationResponse {
391
392    private Double latitude;
393    private Double longitude;
394    private String streetCoordinate;
395    private String locationDescription;
396
397    /**
398     * Returns the location latitude.
399     *
400     * @return latitude.
401     */
402    public Double getLatitude() {
403      return latitude;
404    }
405
406    /**
407     * Sets the location latitude.
408     *
409     * @param latitude latitude.
410     */
411    public void setLatitude(Double latitude) {
412      this.latitude = latitude;
413    }
414
415    /**
416     * Returns the location longitude.
417     *
418     * @return longitude.
419     */
420    public Double getLongitude() {
421      return longitude;
422    }
423
424    /**
425     * Sets the location longitude.
426     *
427     * @param longitude longitude.
428     */
429    public void setLongitude(Double longitude) {
430      this.longitude = longitude;
431    }
432
433    /**
434     * Returns the street coordinate for the location, if provided.
435     *
436     * @return street coordinate.
437     */
438    public String getStreetCoordinate() {
439      return streetCoordinate;
440    }
441
442    /**
443     * Sets the street coordinate for the location.
444     *
445     * @param streetCoordinate street coordinate.
446     */
447    public void setStreetCoordinate(String streetCoordinate) {
448      this.streetCoordinate = streetCoordinate;
449    }
450
451    /**
452     * Returns a free-form location description, if provided.
453     *
454     * @return location description.
455     */
456    public String getLocationDescription() {
457      return locationDescription;
458    }
459
460    /**
461     * Sets a free-form location description.
462     *
463     * @param locationDescription location description.
464     */
465    public void setLocationDescription(String locationDescription) {
466      this.locationDescription = locationDescription;
467    }
468
469    /**
470     * Creates a location DTO from an entity.
471     *
472     * @param reportLocation source entity.
473     * @return populated DTO, or {@code null} if {@code reportLocation} is {@code null}.
474     */
475    public static ReportLocationResponse fromEntity(ReportLocation reportLocation) {
476      if (reportLocation == null) {
477        return null;
478      }
479      ReportLocationResponse dto = new ReportLocationResponse();
480      dto.setLatitude(reportLocation.getLatitude());
481      dto.setLongitude(reportLocation.getLongitude());
482      dto.setStreetCoordinate(reportLocation.getStreetCoordinate());
483      dto.setLocationDescription(reportLocation.getLocationDescription());
484      return dto;
485    }
486
487  }
488
489  /**
490   * Nested DTO exposing a subset of {@link AcceptedState} fields for manager views.
491   */
492  public static class AcceptedStateResponse {
493
494    private String statusTag;
495    private String statusTagDescription;
496
497    /**
498     * Returns the accepted-state status tag.
499     *
500     * @return status tag.
501     */
502    public String getStatusTag() {
503      return statusTag;
504    }
505
506    /**
507     * Sets the accepted-state status tag.
508     *
509     * @param statusTag status tag.
510     */
511    public void setStatusTag(String statusTag) {
512      this.statusTag = statusTag;
513    }
514
515    /**
516     * Returns the accepted-state description.
517     *
518     * @return description.
519     */
520    public String getStatusTagDescription() {
521      return statusTagDescription;
522    }
523
524    /**
525     * Sets the accepted-state description.
526     *
527     * @param statusTagDescription description.
528     */
529    public void setStatusTagDescription(String statusTagDescription) {
530      this.statusTagDescription = statusTagDescription;
531    }
532
533    /**
534     * Creates an accepted-state DTO from an entity.
535     *
536     * @param acceptedState source entity.
537     * @return populated DTO, or {@code null} if {@code acceptedState} is {@code null}.
538     */
539    public static AcceptedStateResponse fromEntity(AcceptedState acceptedState) {
540      if (acceptedState == null) {
541        return null;
542      }
543      AcceptedStateResponse dto = new AcceptedStateResponse();
544      dto.setStatusTag(acceptedState.getStatusTag());
545      dto.setStatusTagDescription(acceptedState.getStatusTagDescription());
546      return dto;
547    }
548
549  }
550
551  /**
552   * Nested DTO exposing a subset of {@link IssueType} fields for manager views.
553   */
554  public static class IssueTypeResponse {
555
556    private String issueTypeTag;
557    private String issueTypeDescription;
558
559    /**
560     * Returns the issue type tag.
561     *
562     * @return issue type tag.
563     */
564    public String getIssueTypeTag() {
565      return issueTypeTag;
566    }
567
568    /**
569     * Sets the issue type tag.
570     *
571     * @param issueTypeTag issue type tag.
572     */
573    public void setIssueTypeTag(String issueTypeTag) {
574      this.issueTypeTag = issueTypeTag;
575    }
576
577    /**
578     * Returns the issue type description.
579     *
580     * @return issue type description.
581     */
582    public String getIssueTypeDescription() {
583      return issueTypeDescription;
584    }
585
586    /**
587     * Sets the issue type description.
588     *
589     * @param issueTypeDescription issue type description.
590     */
591    public void setIssueTypeDescription(String issueTypeDescription) {
592      this.issueTypeDescription = issueTypeDescription;
593    }
594
595    /**
596     * Creates an issue type DTO from an entity.
597     *
598     * @param issueType source entity.
599     * @return populated DTO, or {@code null} if {@code issueType} is {@code null}.
600     */
601    public static IssueTypeResponse fromEntity(IssueType issueType) {
602      if (issueType == null) {
603        return null;
604      }
605      IssueTypeResponse dto = new IssueTypeResponse();
606      dto.setIssueTypeTag(issueType.getIssueTypeTag());
607      dto.setIssueTypeDescription(issueType.getIssueTypeDescription());
608      return dto;
609    }
610
611  }
612
613  /**
614   * Nested DTO exposing a subset of {@link ReportImage} fields for manager views.
615   */
616  public static class ReportImageResponse {
617
618    private URI imageLocator;
619    private String filename;
620    private String mimeType;
621    private int albumOrder;
622
623    /**
624     * Returns the API-facing URI locator for the report image content.
625     *
626     * @return image locator.
627     */
628    public URI getImageLocator() {
629      return imageLocator;
630    }
631
632    /**
633     * Sets the API-facing URI locator for the report image content.
634     *
635     * @param imageLocator image locator.
636     */
637    public void setImageLocator(URI imageLocator) {
638      this.imageLocator = imageLocator;
639    }
640
641    /**
642     * Returns the original filename.
643     *
644     * @return filename.
645     */
646    public String getFilename() {
647      return filename;
648    }
649
650    /**
651     * Sets the original filename.
652     *
653     * @param filename filename.
654     */
655    public void setFilename(String filename) {
656      this.filename = filename;
657    }
658
659    /**
660     * Returns the MIME type of the image.
661     *
662     * @return MIME type.
663     */
664    public String getMimeType() {
665      return mimeType;
666    }
667
668    /**
669     * Sets the MIME type of the image.
670     *
671     * @param mimeType MIME type.
672     */
673    public void setMimeType(String mimeType) {
674      this.mimeType = mimeType;
675    }
676
677    /**
678     * Returns the album order index used for sorting images within a report.
679     *
680     * @return album order.
681     */
682    public int getAlbumOrder() {
683      return albumOrder;
684    }
685
686    /**
687     * Sets the album order index used for sorting images within a report.
688     *
689     * @param albumOrder album order.
690     */
691    public void setAlbumOrder(int albumOrder) {
692      this.albumOrder = albumOrder;
693    }
694
695    /**
696     * Creates a report image DTO from an entity.
697     *
698     * @param reportExternalId external identifier of the parent report (used to build an API locator).
699     * @param reportImage source entity.
700     * @return populated DTO, or {@code null} if {@code reportImage} is {@code null}.
701     */
702    public static ReportImageResponse fromEntity(UUID reportExternalId, ReportImage reportImage) {
703      if (reportImage == null) {
704        return null;
705      }
706      ReportImageResponse dto = new ReportImageResponse();
707      // API-facing locator: canonical binary content endpoint.
708      if (reportExternalId != null && reportImage.getExternalId() != null) {
709        dto.setImageLocator(URI.create("/issue-reports/" + reportExternalId + "/images/" + reportImage.getExternalId()));
710      }
711      dto.setFilename(reportImage.getFilename());
712      dto.setMimeType(reportImage.getMimeType());
713      dto.setAlbumOrder(reportImage.getAlbumOrder());
714      return dto;
715    }
716
717  }
718
719}
720
